title: The Cave Rat King
description: Boss intro for the Cave Rat King in the Whispering Cave. Fourth-wall-breaking rat with a tiny crown.

lines: The party reaches the deepest chamber of the Whispering Cave.
A massive rat sits on a throne of cheese wheels, wearing a crown far too small for the dignity it aspires to.

lines.speaker: Cave Rat King
lines.text: Ah, another party. Let me guess — you automated your way here?

lines.speaker: Cave Rat King
lines.text: I've watched THOUSANDS of you. Same scripts. Same builds. Same 'optimal' strategies.

lines.speaker: Cave Rat King
lines.text: You think you're clever? I've EVOLVED. I've read the source code. I know what you're going to do.
